build_sentence.context: Are you ready to order?
build_sentence.answer: I need a few minutes
build_sentence.hint_zh: （點餐時）表示自己還需要幾分鐘才能決定。

build_sentence.context: Do you know where the library is?
build_sentence.answer: It's right behind the science building
build_sentence.hint_zh: 告訴對方圖書館就在科學館後面。

build_sentence.context: I just finished my last exam.
build_sentence.answer: How do you think it went
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方覺得這場考試考得怎麼樣。

build_sentence.context: Should we meet before the study group?
build_sentence.answer: Let's meet outside the coffee shop instead
build_sentence.hint_zh: 提議改約在咖啡店外面碰面。

build_sentence.context: Why weren't you in class today?
build_sentence.answer: I woke up with a bad cold
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明自己起床時得了重感冒。

build_sentence.context: I'm thinking about dropping the economics course.
build_sentence.answer: Have you talked to your advisor about it
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方有沒有先跟指導教授談過這件事。

build_sentence.context: The professor moved the deadline to Friday.
build_sentence.answer: That takes a lot of pressure off me
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示這（延後）幫自己減輕了不少壓力。

build_sentence.context: Did you hear the campus shuttle is free now?
build_sentence.answer: That will save a lot of students some money
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示這會幫很多學生省下不少錢。

build_sentence.context: I'm having trouble understanding the reading assignment.
build_sentence.answer: Should we try going through it together after class
build_sentence.hint_zh: 提議下課後一起把這篇讀物弄懂。

build_sentence.context: I can't decide which elective to take next semester.
build_sentence.answer: You should pick the one that works with your schedule
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議選能配合自己時間的那一門。

build_sentence.context: The library is completely packed during finals week.
build_sentence.answer: That's exactly why I reserve a study room ahead of time
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示所以自己才會提前預約自習室。

build_sentence.context: I've been feeling overwhelmed with all my coursework lately.
build_sentence.answer: Have you thought about talking to someone at the counseling center
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方有沒有想過去諮商中心找人聊聊。

build_sentence.context: I'm not sure I can finish this project by tomorrow.
build_sentence.answer: You could ask the professor to give you a couple more days
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議去請教授多給自己幾天時間。

build_sentence.context: I heard the biology midterm is going to be really difficult.
build_sentence.answer: That's exactly why I've been reviewing my notes for the past two weeks
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示所以自己這兩週一直在複習筆記。

build_sentence.context: I completely forgot to sign up for the campus tour.
build_sentence.answer: Do you think there are any spots left for the tour this weekend
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方覺得這週末的導覽還有沒有名額。

build_sentence.context: I still don't understand how to cite sources in this format.
build_sentence.answer: The writing center offers free workshops that can walk you through the whole process
build_sentence.hint_zh: 告訴對方寫作中心有免費工作坊，能帶你走過整個流程。

build_sentence.context: Where are you going after class?
build_sentence.answer: I'm heading to the library
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我要去圖書館。

build_sentence.context: Have you finished the reading assignment?
build_sentence.answer: I have two chapters left to read
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我還有兩章要讀。

build_sentence.context: I'm throwing a party this weekend.
build_sentence.answer: Can I bring a guest too
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我可以帶一位客人一起去嗎?

build_sentence.context: Why were you late this morning?
build_sentence.answer: My alarm didn't go off
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我的鬧鐘沒有響。

build_sentence.context: This math problem is really confusing.
build_sentence.answer: Do you want some help with it
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你需要我幫忙嗎?

build_sentence.context: How was the biology lecture today?
build_sentence.answer: I learned a lot from it
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我從中學到很多。

build_sentence.context: I just got tickets to the concert.
build_sentence.answer: Which band are you going to see
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你要去看哪個樂團?

build_sentence.context: Do you want to grab lunch now?
build_sentence.answer: I'd rather eat after my meeting
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我寧願開完會再吃。

build_sentence.context: Can you help me move this weekend?
build_sentence.answer: I have to work all weekend
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我整個週末都要工作。

build_sentence.context: I'm not sure which class to take.
build_sentence.answer: Have you asked your academic advisor
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你問過指導教授了嗎?

build_sentence.context: The cafeteria is closed today.
build_sentence.answer: Let's grab something from the vending machine
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們去自動販賣機買點東西吧。

build_sentence.context: I found a great study spot on campus.
build_sentence.answer: Where can I find that place
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我在哪裡可以找到那個地方?

build_sentence.context: Are you ready for the exam tomorrow?
build_sentence.answer: I need one more day to prepare
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我還需要一天來準備。

build_sentence.context: What did you think of the movie?
build_sentence.answer: I thought it was too long
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我覺得它太長了。

build_sentence.context: I'm planning a trip during spring break.
build_sentence.answer: Where are you thinking of going
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你想去哪裡?

build_sentence.context: Could you lend me your notes?
build_sentence.answer: I'll email them to you
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我會把筆記寄給你。

build_sentence.context: This coffee shop is always so crowded.
build_sentence.answer: Let's try the one across the street
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們去對街那家試試吧。

build_sentence.context: I got an A on my essay!
build_sentence.answer: How did you manage to do that
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你是怎麼辦到的?

build_sentence.context: Do you understand this chemistry formula?
build_sentence.answer: I find it confusing as well
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我也覺得它很難懂。

build_sentence.context: The library closes at nine tonight.
build_sentence.answer: We should finish this before then
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們應該在那之前完成。

build_sentence.context: I'm thinking about joining a club.
build_sentence.answer: Which one interests you the most
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你對哪一個最有興趣?

build_sentence.context: Can we meet to discuss the group project?
build_sentence.answer: I'm free any time after three
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我三點以後隨時有空。

build_sentence.context: I can't find my student ID card.
build_sentence.answer: Check the pocket of your backpack
build_sentence.hint_zh: 檢查一下你背包的口袋。

build_sentence.context: I decided to change my major.
build_sentence.answer: What made you change your mind
build_sentence.hint_zh: 是什麼讓你改變主意的?

build_sentence.context: The weather looks pretty bad outside.
build_sentence.answer: Don't forget to bring an umbrella
build_sentence.hint_zh: 別忘了帶把傘。

build_sentence.context: Have you seen my textbook anywhere?
build_sentence.answer: You left it in the classroom
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你把它忘在教室了。

build_sentence.context: I'm really nervous about my presentation.
build_sentence.answer: Would you like to practice with me
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你想跟我一起練習嗎?

build_sentence.context: Thanks for helping me study last night.
build_sentence.answer: I'm glad I could help you out
build_sentence.hint_zh: 很高興我能幫上你的忙。

build_sentence.context: Should we take the bus or walk?
build_sentence.answer: Walking will take us too long
build_sentence.hint_zh: 走路會花太多時間。

build_sentence.context: I bought a new laptop yesterday.
build_sentence.answer: How much did it cost you
build_sentence.hint_zh: 它花了你多少錢?

build_sentence.context: I don't know how to solve this.
build_sentence.answer: Try asking the teaching assistant
build_sentence.hint_zh: 試著問問助教吧。

build_sentence.context: The dorm kitchen is a total mess.
build_sentence.answer: We should clean it up together
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們應該一起把它清乾淨。

build_sentence.context: I'm going to the bookstore now.
build_sentence.answer: Could you get me a notebook
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你可以幫我買本筆記本嗎?

build_sentence.context: Why is everyone leaving the lecture hall?
build_sentence.answer: The professor canceled today's afternoon session
build_sentence.hint_zh: 教授取消了今天下午的課。

build_sentence.context: I'm exhausted after that long hike.
build_sentence.answer: Let's take a break over there
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們去那邊休息一下吧。

build_sentence.context: I signed up for a morning yoga class.
build_sentence.answer: When does the first class begin
build_sentence.hint_zh: 第一堂課什麼時候開始?

build_sentence.context: I left my charger at home again.
build_sentence.answer: You can borrow mine for now
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你可以先借我的用。

build_sentence.context: There's a guest speaker in the auditorium.
build_sentence.answer: Do you know what she's talking about
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你知道她在講什麼嗎?

build_sentence.context: My roommate keeps borrowing my things.
build_sentence.answer: You should talk to him about it
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你應該找他談談這件事。

build_sentence.context: This recipe calls for three fresh eggs.
build_sentence.answer: We are out of fresh eggs
build_sentence.hint_zh: 我們沒有新鮮雞蛋了。

build_sentence.context: I'm applying for a summer internship.
build_sentence.answer: Have you finished your resume yet
build_sentence.hint_zh: 你的履歷寫好了嗎?

build_sentence.context: Thanks for inviting me to dinner.
build_sentence.answer: You're welcome to join us anytime
build_sentence.hint_zh: 歡迎你隨時加入我們。

build_sentence.context: Why did you skip the study group yesterday afternoon?
build_sentence.answer: I had to visit the dentist because my tooth was aching
build_sentence.hint_zh: 解釋你因牙齒疼痛必須去看牙醫。

build_sentence.context: What did the professor announce about the final research paper?
build_sentence.answer: She wants us to submit our drafts before the winter break
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明教授要你們在寒假前繳交草稿。

build_sentence.context: I really need a quiet spot to prepare for finals.
build_sentence.answer: Have you tried the reading room on the library's top floor
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否試過圖書館頂樓的閱覽室。

build_sentence.context: My laptop keeps freezing whenever I open the presentation software.
build_sentence.answer: You should ask the technician who staffs the campus help desk
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方去問管理校園服務台的技術人員。

build_sentence.context: I honestly can't decide which elective to register for.
build_sentence.answer: Why don't you pick the course that matches your career plans
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方選擇符合職涯規劃的課程。

build_sentence.context: The dining hall was impossibly crowded at noon today.
build_sentence.answer: That happens every time they serve the curry students really enjoy
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明每次供應學生喜愛的咖哩時都會這樣。

build_sentence.context: I heard you finally moved into an off-campus apartment.
build_sentence.answer: It takes me half an hour to reach the science building
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明你要花半小時才能到理學院大樓。

build_sentence.context: Did you sign up for the weekend trip to the art museum?
build_sentence.answer: I still need to register for it before this Friday's deadline
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明你仍須在本週五截止前報名。

build_sentence.context: Do you want to grab coffee after the chemistry lab?
build_sentence.answer: I can't because my advisor asked to meet this afternoon
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明你不行因為指導教授約你下午見面。

build_sentence.context: How did your internship interview go this morning?
build_sentence.answer: They asked several tough questions that I could barely answer
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明他們問了幾個你幾乎答不出來的難題。

build_sentence.context: I'm thinking about joining the campus debate club.
build_sentence.answer: Do you know when they hold their weekly practice sessions
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問他們每週何時舉行練習。

build_sentence.context: I left my umbrella somewhere in the student center.
build_sentence.answer: Did you check the lost and found near the main entrance
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否查看過大門附近的失物招領處。

build_sentence.context: I'm exhausted from staying up to finish the lab report.
build_sentence.answer: You should get some rest before your presentation tomorrow morning
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方在明早報告前好好休息。

build_sentence.context: The bookstore says my textbook is out of stock.
build_sentence.answer: Could you borrow a copy from someone in your seminar
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方能否向研討課的同學借一本。

build_sentence.context: I don't understand the feedback the professor wrote on my essay.
build_sentence.answer: You could visit her office during the hours she posted online
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方在教授公布的辦公時間去找她。

build_sentence.context: I want to improve my grade in statistics this term.
build_sentence.answer: Have you considered hiring a tutor from the math department
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否考慮請數學系的家教。

build_sentence.context: The registration system rejected my course selection again.
build_sentence.answer: You may need to clear the holds on your student account
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明對方可能需要解除學生帳戶上的限制。

build_sentence.context: I'm nervous about presenting in front of the whole class.
build_sentence.answer: Try to practice your speech until the words feel natural
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方反覆練習演講直到說得自然。

build_sentence.context: My roommate plays loud music every single night.
build_sentence.answer: Have you talked to the resident advisor about the noise
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否向宿舍輔導員反映噪音。

build_sentence.context: I can't decide whether to study abroad next year.
build_sentence.answer: You should discuss the options with someone who studied overseas
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方和曾出國留學的人討論選項。

build_sentence.context: The deadline for the scholarship application is approaching.
build_sentence.answer: Do you know which documents the committee requires from applicants
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問委員會要求申請者提供哪些文件。

build_sentence.context: I keep falling behind in my morning economics lecture.
build_sentence.answer: You could record the lectures so you can review them later
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方錄下講課以便日後複習。

build_sentence.context: I spilled coffee all over my sociology notes.
build_sentence.answer: Ask a classmate if you can photocopy the pages you lost
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方問同學能否影印弄丟的頁面。

build_sentence.context: I've never used the printers in the computer lab.
build_sentence.answer: Would you like me to show you how they work
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否要你示範印表機的使用方式。

build_sentence.context: The group project is due and one member disappeared.
build_sentence.answer: You ought to email the professor about the missing teammate
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方寫信告訴教授有組員失聯。

build_sentence.context: I'm looking for a part-time job near campus.
build_sentence.answer: Have you checked the openings posted at the career center
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否看過職涯中心張貼的職缺。

build_sentence.context: I really struggled with the essay question on the midterm.
build_sentence.answer: Everyone found it hard because the wording was so confusing
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明大家都覺得難因為題目敘述太令人困惑。

build_sentence.context: I want to join a club but don't know which one.
build_sentence.answer: Pick one that connects to the field you plan to study
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方選擇和打算主修領域相關的社團。

build_sentence.context: The weather forecast predicts heavy snow this weekend.
build_sentence.answer: Should we reschedule the hiking trip we planned for Saturday
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問是否該改期原定週六的健行。

build_sentence.context: I forgot to save my document before the computer restarted.
build_sentence.answer: Check whether the program kept a backup of your file
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方檢查程式是否保留了檔案備份。

build_sentence.context: I'm worried I won't finish reading before the seminar.
build_sentence.answer: Focus on the chapters the professor marked as most important
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方專注在教授標為最重要的章節。

build_sentence.context: I'd like to see the new exhibit at the gallery.
build_sentence.answer: Do you want to go together after our afternoon classes end
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否想在下午課後一起去。

build_sentence.context: My presentation slides look boring and plain.
build_sentence.answer: Add some charts that help the audience follow your main points
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方加入能幫助聽眾理解重點的圖表。

build_sentence.context: I missed the announcement about the schedule change.
build_sentence.answer: Check the email the department sent us earlier this morning
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方查看系上今早稍早寄的電子郵件。

build_sentence.context: I've been feeling stressed about my heavy course load.
build_sentence.answer: Have you thought about dropping one of your harder classes
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否想過退掉一門較難的課。

build_sentence.context: The library closes earlier than I expected on weekends.
build_sentence.answer: You can study at the cafe that stays open until midnight
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方去營業到午夜的咖啡館唸書。

build_sentence.context: I don't know how to cite sources in this format.
build_sentence.answer: The writing center offers workshops that explain every citation style
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明寫作中心有講解各種引用格式的工作坊。

build_sentence.context: I'm not sure my thesis statement is strong enough.
build_sentence.answer: Would you mind reading it before I hand the paper in
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否願意在交報告前幫忙看。

build_sentence.context: The bus to downtown was twenty minutes late again.
build_sentence.answer: The subway will get you there faster than the crowded bus
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明地鐵會比擁擠的公車更快到達。

build_sentence.context: I can't concentrate when I study in my noisy dorm.
build_sentence.answer: Move to a study pod where nobody is allowed to talk
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方換到不准說話的自習隔間。

build_sentence.context: I really enjoyed the guest lecture on climate policy.
build_sentence.answer: Did you get a chance to ask the speaker any questions
build_sentence.hint_zh: 詢問對方是否有機會向講者提問。

build_sentence.context: I want to thank the professor for writing my recommendation.
build_sentence.answer: Send her a note expressing how much the support meant
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議對方寫張紙條表達那份支持對你意義重大。

lnr_sets.title: 校園行政（註冊與選課）
sentences: I need to update my address.
You have to fill out this form first.
I want to add a couple of new classes.
Could you tell me when the add-drop deadline is this term?
You're going to need to get your advisor's signature on this form.
If you miss the deadline, you will have to pay a late fee.
I could have submitted everything on time if I had known about the new deadline.

lnr_sets.title: 課堂學術（討論與作業）
sentences: Let's look at the next chapter.
I want to focus on the main idea.
Most of the students seem to struggle with this concept.
You are going to write a short response paper for tomorrow.
We could have covered a couple of these topics a lot sooner.
The results of the experiment did not really match what we had expected.
If you want to do well on the exam, you have to review all of the readings.

lnr_sets.title: 日常生活（購物與雜事）
sentences: I have to run some errands.
Do you want to come along with me?
I need to pick up a couple of things.
We are going to stop by the store on the way.
Most of the shops downtown are going to close early on Sunday.
I could have saved some money if I had brought a coupon along.
If we want to avoid the crowds, we should try to get there before noon.

lnr_sets.title: 社交活動（聚會與邀約）
sentences: We are going to a party.
Do you want to join us later tonight?
A couple of my friends are coming over too.
We are going to meet up at the coffee shop first.
Most of the group wants to go see the new movie downtown.
You could have come with us if you had finished a little earlier.
If you want to come, we are going to leave around eight after we grab dinner.

lnr_sets.title: 選課註冊
sentences: I want to register for classes.
I'm going to add a couple of courses.
I should have signed up for it a lot sooner.
The registrar could have opened the online portal a little earlier.
Most of the popular seminars filled up within a couple of minutes.
I'm definitely going to email my advisor about a couple of schedule conflicts.
If the class is already full, I could have added my name to the waitlist.

lnr_sets.title: 圖書館借書
sentences: I need to borrow this book.
I want to renew a couple of titles.
The due date is going to be next Friday.
You could have checked the online catalog from your phone.
Most of the reserved readings are kept on the second floor.
I'm going to ask the librarian about a couple of missing pages.
Since the book is already overdue, I should have returned it a couple of days ago.

lnr_sets.title: 教授辦公室時間
sentences: I want to visit your office.
Are you going to hold office hours today?
I could have come by a little bit earlier.
I have a couple of quick questions about the midterm.
Most of the material in the fourth chapter really confused me.
I'm going to bring my notes and review a couple of problems.
If you have a minute, I would really like to go over the essay you graded.

lnr_sets.title: 化學實驗課
sentences: We have to wear safety goggles.
I'm going to measure the first sample.
You should have labeled each of the beakers.
We could have finished the titration a bit faster.
Most of the reaction is going to happen within seconds.
We want to record a couple of readings from this final trial.
Because the acid is dangerous, we are going to handle it under the fume hood.

lnr_sets.title: 小組報告
sentences: We need to plan our presentation.
I'm going to make the opening slides.
We could have divided the topics more evenly.
Each of the members wants to speak for five minutes.
We should have practiced our timing a couple of more times.
I'm going to email everyone the final slides before our rehearsal tonight.
When the professor asks us questions, we want to sound confident and completely well prepared.

lnr_sets.title: 期末考週
sentences: Finals week is almost here.
I'm going to study every single night.
I should have started reviewing a lot sooner.
Most of the exams are going to be cumulative.
I want to reserve a couple of hours for chemistry.
I could have avoided so much of this last minute stress.
Since all my tests fall on the same day, I am going to be exhausted.

lnr_sets.title: 繳交報告
sentences: My essay is due tonight.
I want to submit it online.
I'm going to upload the final draft soon.
I could have proofread the whole thing one more time.
Most of the sources actually came from the online library database.
I should have cited a couple of extra articles for the argument.
If the system crashes before midnight, I am going to email the file to my professor.

lnr_sets.title: 宿舍申請
sentences: I want to live on campus.
I'm going to apply for campus housing.
The deadline is a couple of weeks away.
I could have picked a much quieter dorm building.
Most of the affordable single rooms are already completely taken.
I'm going to request a roommate with a similar daily schedule.
Because the forms are due soon, I should have submitted my preferences a couple of days ago.

lnr_sets.title: 助教答疑
sentences: The TA runs a review session.
I want to ask about the homework.
I'm going to bring a couple of questions.
You could have emailed the TA over the weekend.
Most of the confusion came from the second problem set.
I should have written down every one of those tricky steps.
When the TA explains it slowly, the material starts to make a lot more sense.

lnr_sets.title: 退選課程
sentences: I want to drop this class.
The workload is going to be overwhelming.
I should have checked the syllabus more carefully.
I could have talked to a couple of former students.
Most of the weekly assignments require a lot of extra reading.
I'm going to fill out the official drop form this afternoon instead.
If I drop it now, I would have room for a couple of lighter courses.

lnr_sets.title: 加簽課程
sentences: I want to add one more course.
I'm going to ask for a permission code.
You could have gotten a couple of extra signatures.
Most of the seats open up after the first week.
The professor really should have approved my add request by now.
I'm going to attend the lecture during this entire add drop period.
Once the professor signs my form, I am going to bring it straight to the registrar.

lnr_sets.title: 校園導覽
sentences: The campus tour starts soon.
We're going to see the main library.
I want to check out the science buildings.
Most of the freshmen live near the dining hall.

The guide is going to show us a couple of hidden study spots.

lnr_sets.title: 註冊組辦公室
sentences: I need to update my records.

I'm going to fill out this address form.

Most of the paperwork is going to take a few days.

Since the office closes at four, I am going to come back early tomorrow morning.

lnr_sets.title: 獎學金申請
sentences: I want to apply for a scholarship.
The application is going to need two essays.
I should have asked for a recommendation letter sooner.
Most of the applicants list at least a couple of references.

I'm going to submit the entire application well before next Monday's official deadline.
If the committee likes my essay, I could have a good chance at the award.

lnr_sets.title: 讀書小組
sentences: Let's form a study group.
We're going to meet on Thursday.
I want to review a couple of chapters.
We could have booked a room in the library.
Most of the group prefers to study in the evening.
You should have shared your notes with the rest of us.
When we quiz each other, the tricky concepts are going to stick a lot better.

lnr_sets.title: 指導教授諮詢
sentences: I want to meet my advisor.

Most of the core requirements are going to overlap quite nicely.

I want to graduate right on time without overloading any single busy semester.
Because my schedule is so tight, my advisor is going to suggest a lighter summer plan.

sentences: The computer lab is open now.

I'm going to save it to the cloud.

lnr_sets.title: 實習申請

lnr_sets.title: 預約研究小間

lnr_sets.title: 課程大綱
sentences: Let's look at the syllabus.

The exams are going to be worth half.

I could have saved a lot of time by reading the schedule first.
Because participation counts so much, I am going to speak up in every single class.

lnr_sets.title: 實地考察
sentences: Our class has a field trip.
We're going to visit the history museum.
I want to bring a couple of snacks.

While we tour the gallery, we are going to take notes for the follow up essay.

lnr_sets.title: 補考安排
sentences: I missed the midterm exam.
I want to schedule a make-up.
The professor is going to allow it.

I could have avoided this whole mess with a doctor's note.
Once I bring a doctor's note, the office is going to approve my make-up date.

lnr_sets.title: 論文口試
sentences: My thesis defense is next week.
I want to review my slides again.
The committee is going to ask hard questions.
I should have rehearsed my talk a couple of times.

sentences: I want to join a club.

Because I love photography, I want to help run the club's biggest annual exhibition.

lnr_sets.title: 學習中心輔導
sentences: I want to visit the writing center.
A tutor is going to read my essay.
I should have booked an appointment a lot earlier.
Most of the tutors are going to be graduate students.
I could have fixed a couple of these grammar mistakes myself.
The tutor is going to help me organize my confusing thesis paragraph.
When my draft feels messy, the tutors are going to show me how to tighten it.

lnr_sets.title: 修改選課
sentences: I want to change my schedule.
Two of my classes are going to overlap.
I should have noticed the time conflict much sooner.
I could have swapped a couple of the sections online.
Most of the early morning slots are going to be gone.
I'm going to meet my advisor about all of these possible changes.
If a better section opens up, I am going to move my lab to the afternoon.

lnr_sets.title: 學期成績
sentences: Final grades are coming out soon.
I want to check my report card.
My average is going to look pretty good.
I could have earned a couple of higher grades.
Most of the professors already post the final results online.
I should have studied harder for a couple of the finals.
If my grade seems wrong, I am going to email the professor about a possible mistake.

lnr_sets.title: 畢業審查
sentences: I want to graduate this spring.
The office is going to check my credits.
I should have counted my total units more carefully.
I could have finished a couple of requirements last year.
Most of the transfer credits are going to count just fine.
I'm going to double check the list with a couple of advisors.
Once the dean signs off on my file, I am going to order my cap and gown.

lnr_sets.title: 植物細胞(生物課)
sentences: All cells share some basic features.
Today let's look at a plant cell.
A plant cell has a thick wall around its membrane.
The nucleus stores all of the genetic information the cell needs.
During photosynthesis, the green leaves turn sunlight and water into usable energy.
If you look through the microscope now, you can see the tiny chloroplasts.
Because plants make their own food, they form the base of almost every food chain.

lnr_sets.title: 古羅馬帝國(歷史課)
sentences: Let's talk about ancient Rome today.
The empire kept growing for several hundred years.
Roads connected the distant cities to the capital in Rome.
Soldiers often marched along these roads to defend the far borders.
The Romans borrowed a lot of their ideas from the earlier Greeks.
Over time, the empire became far too large for one ruler to govern.
When the borders finally collapsed, the whole western empire broke apart into many smaller kingdoms.

lnr_sets.title: 加熱反應(化學實驗)
sentences: Put on your safety goggles first.
We're going to heat this clear liquid slowly.
Pour a little bit of acid into the test tube.
Write down the temperature every thirty seconds and record it carefully.
As soon as the mixture turns blue, add a drop of water.
Be really careful, because the glass is going to get extremely hot now.
Once the reaction is finished, we'll compare our results with the other groups in class.

lnr_sets.title: 自由落體(物理課)
sentences: Force equals mass times acceleration.
Today let's look at how heavy objects fall.
A heavy ball and a light ball fall down together.
Gravity pulls on both of them at exactly the same rate.
In a vacuum, a feather drops just as fast as a stone.
If we drop these two objects from the high roof, they land together.
Although it seems strange at first, air resistance is the only thing that slows the feather down.

lnr_sets.title: 小說主角(文學課)
sentences: Let's discuss the main character today.
The author sets the whole story in winter.
The cold weather reflects the deep sadness of the hero.
Notice how often the writer repeats the word darkness in it.
Each of the chapters ends with a question the reader must answer.
Try to read the final page again and think about its real meaning.
By the time the novel ends, we understand that the hero has changed completely inside.

lnr_sets.title: 河流與土地(地理課)
sentences: Rivers shape the land over time.
This long river starts high in the mountains.
It flows down through the wide valley to the sea.
Along the way, it drops a lot of soft mud behind.
This soft mud makes the soil near the river banks very rich.
Because of this, many of the world's first cities grew beside big rivers.
When the rains come too hard, the river can flood the fields that feed the town.

lnr_sets.title: 分數運算(數學課)
sentences: Let's start with simple fractions today.
A fraction shows us a part of something.
The number on the bottom tells you the total parts.
To add them together, the bottom numbers have to match first.
Once they match, you just add the tops and keep the bottom.
Let's work through a couple of these examples on the board together now.
If you can master these basic steps, the harder problems will feel a lot easier later.

lnr_sets.title: 調色作畫(美術課)
sentences: Today we'll paint with warm colors.
Start with a light pencil sketch on paper.
Don't press too hard, or else you'll tear the paper.
Mix a little bit of red into the bright yellow paint.
Notice how the warm colors seem to glow next to each other.
Let the first layer dry completely before you add another one on top.
Once your painting is finished, we'll hang all of them along the wall for everyone to see.

lnr_sets.title: 供給與需求(經濟學課)
sentences: Supply and demand set the price.
When something is rare, the price goes up.
When there's plenty of it, the price tends to drop.
Of course, sellers want a high price for their own goods.
Buyers, on the other hand, want to pay as little as possible.
The market slowly settles at a price where both of the sides agree.
If a sudden shortage hits the market, prices can rise faster than most people expect them to.

lnr_sets.title: 查找資料(圖書館)
sentences: I need to find some sources.
Let's search the online catalog for that topic.
Type a couple of keywords into the little search box.
The books on that subject are up on the third floor.
Write down the call number so that you can find the shelf.
If the book is checked out, you can put a hold on it.
Once you gather all of your sources, make sure you note where each fact originally came from.

lnr_sets.title: 分工合作(小組報告)
sentences: Let's split up the work fairly.
Each of us can take one main part.
I'll handle the slides if you can write the script.
We should probably meet again before the end of the week.
Let's send all of our parts to each other by Friday night.
If someone gets stuck, just go ahead and ask the rest for help.
As long as we all do our share, this presentation should come together without much trouble.

lnr_sets.title: 課後提問(辦公室時間)
sentences: I have a quick question, professor.
I didn't really get last week's whole lecture.
Could you explain that second point just one more time?
I read the chapter, but the math confused me a bit.
Is there a chance you could go over the homework with me?
I want to make sure I understand this before the exam next week.
Thank you so much for taking the time to explain everything that I found so confusing.

lnr_sets.title: 星空與宇宙(天文課)
sentences: The moon orbits around the earth.
It takes about a month to circle us.
The sun is much larger than it looks from here.
Light from the sun takes about eight minutes to reach us.
The tiny stars that we see at night are really distant suns.
A few of those little points of light are actually entire distant galaxies.
When you look up at a clear night sky, you are really staring deep into the distant past.

lnr_sets.title: 記憶的形成(心理學課)
sentences: Human memory is not always reliable.
Our brains often fill in the missing details.
We tend to remember the feeling more than the facts.
A strong emotion can make a false memory feel very real.
Two people can watch the very same event and recall it differently.
Over the years, our oldest memories slowly change without us even noticing it.
Because our minds rebuild the past each time, no memory stays exactly the same for long.

lnr_sets.title: 程式除錯(電腦課)
sentences: Let's open the code editor now.
Every program here starts with a simple loop.
A loop just repeats the same steps over and over.
Check your spelling carefully, because the computer reads every single letter.
Even one tiny mistake can stop the whole program from running properly.
Run the whole program again and see whether it prints the right answer.
If the output still looks wrong, add a print line so you can see what went wrong.

lnr_sets.title: 合奏練習(音樂課)
sentences: Let's warm up with some scales.
Keep all your fingers close to the keys.
Play the notes slowly at first until they feel natural.
Listen to the steady beat and try to stay in time.
Don't rush through the ending, even if the whole song feels easy.
Once you know this piece really well, we can add a second part.
When the whole class plays together in time, even a simple tune can sound really beautiful.

lnr_sets.title: 採買清單(超市)
sentences: Let's grab a shopping cart first.
We need some milk and a dozen eggs.
The fresh bread is over there by the far wall.
Could you go check if the apples are on sale today?
Let's grab a big bag of rice while we're in this aisle.
Don't forget that we still need to pick up some coffee for tomorrow.
Once we've got everything on the list, let's head to the shortest line and pay quickly.

lnr_sets.title: 點餐用餐(餐廳)
sentences: Could we see the menu, please?
I think I'll have the grilled fish tonight.
Does this dish come with a small side of rice?
Could you please bring us a couple of glasses of water?
I'm not quite sure yet, so give us a few more minutes.
Everything was really delicious, but I don't think I have room for dessert.

lnr_sets.title: 搭乘地鐵(交通)
sentences: Which train line goes to downtown?

Tap your card on the reader before you go through.
The platform for our train line is just down those stairs.
Let's stand back a bit and wait for the doors to open.
We have to change over to another train at the very third stop.
If we miss this one, another train should come along in about five or six minutes.

lnr_sets.title: 看喉嚨痛(診所)
sentences: I'd like to see a doctor.
I've had a bad sore throat since Monday.
The pain gets much worse when I try to swallow.
Have you taken anything for it in the last few days?
Let me take a look at your throat and check your temperature.
It looks like a mild throat infection, so I'll write you a prescription.
Take one pill twice a day, and come back next week if you still feel sick.

lnr_sets.title: 點一杯咖啡(咖啡店)
sentences: Can I get a small latte?
I'd like it with some oat milk, please.
Could you please make that one a little less sweet?
Are you drinking it in here, or taking it to go?
I'll also take one of those little chocolate muffins in the case.
Your order will be ready in just a couple of minutes over there.
If you find a seat by the window, I'll bring your coffee over when it's ready.

lnr_sets.title: 開戶存款(銀行)
sentences: I'd like to open an account.
I need to deposit this small check today.
Do I have to fill out any of these forms?
Could you please tell me the balance on my savings account?
I'd also like to transfer some money over to my other account.
Your new card should arrive in the mail within about a week or so.

lnr_sets.title: 寄送包裹(郵局)
sentences: I need to mail this package.
How much would it cost to send this?
I'd like to send it by the very fastest way.
Do you want to add some tracking and insurance to it?
Please write the full address clearly on the front of the box.
It should get there in about three days if you send it now.
If nobody is home to sign for it, the carrier will leave a slip in your mailbox.

lnr_sets.title: 重訓熱身(健身房)
sentences: Let's warm up before we start.
Don't lift too much on the first day.
Keep your back straight when you pick the weight up.
Try to breathe out slowly every single time you push up.
Rest for a minute or two in between each of the sets.
Drink plenty of water so that you don't get too tired later on.
As long as you keep showing up each week, you'll get a lot stronger before you know it.

lnr_sets.title: 登機報到(機場)
sentences: Let's check in at the counter.
Do you have any bags to check in?
Our gate is all the way down at the end.
We should go through security now before it gets too crowded.
Make sure that you take your laptop out of your bag first.
Our flight is going to start boarding in about forty minutes from now.
Once we get through the gate, let's find a quick place to eat before the plane takes off.

lnr_sets.title: 旅館入住(飯店)
sentences: I have a room reserved tonight.

Could I get a room up on a higher floor?

Here's your key card, and the elevator is just around the corner.
Let us know if you need any extra towels or anything else tonight.
When you check out tomorrow, just leave the key at the desk and we'll email you the receipt.

lnr_sets.title: 領藥諮詢(藥局)
sentences: I need to fill a prescription.

Take one of these twice a day, right after you eat.
This kind of medicine might make you feel a little bit sleepy.
Try not to drink any coffee at all while you're taking these pills.
If the cough doesn't get better in a few days, go back and see your doctor.

lnr_sets.title: 找一本書(書店)
sentences: I'm looking for a good novel.

I read a review online that said it was really worth reading.
Could you order in a copy for me if it's out of stock?
Since you like this kind of story, you might also enjoy the ones on that shelf over there.

lnr_sets.title: 洗衣做家事(家務)
sentences: Let's sort out the dirty clothes.
Keep the whites and colors in separate piles.
Don't put too much soap in the washing machine here.
Set it to a cold wash so that the colors last.
Hang the wet shirts up to dry instead of using the dryer.
Could you fold up the towels while I put the sheets away now?
Once the laundry is done, let's clean up the kitchen before our friends come over tonight.

lnr_sets.title: 週末邀約(電話)
sentences: Hey, are you free this weekend?
I was thinking we could grab some lunch.
There's a new place that I've been wanting to try.
Do you want to meet up there around noon or so?
We could probably invite Sam along too, if he's not too busy.
Let me know what time works for you, and I'll book us a table.
If something comes up and you can't make it, just call me and we'll pick another day.

lnr_sets.title: 野餐時光(公園)
sentences: Let's sit under that big tree.

Let's spread the blanket out right under that big oak tree.
The little kids can run around while we set up the food.
Let's pack all of it up before it starts to get dark outside.
As soon as the sun goes down, it can get pretty chilly, so let's bring a warm jacket.

lnr_sets.title: 看房租屋(租屋)

lnr_sets.title: 攝影社外拍
sentences: The photography club meets weekly.

lnr_sets.title: 打工面試

lnr_sets.title: 迎新週活動

A lot of clubs set up booths outside today.

lnr_sets.title: 樂團表演
sentences: Our band plays this Friday.

When the crowd starts cheering tonight, we are going to give them our very best show.

lnr_sets.title: 讀書會
sentences: Our study group meets tonight.
We want to review the whole chapter.

I am going to explain the hardest problems first.
We could have booked a much quieter room upstairs instead.
Everyone brought a lot of notes to share with the group.

lnr_sets.title: 校園導覽
sentences: I lead campus tours now.

lnr_sets.title: 校內球賽

If we win the final tomorrow, a lot of our classmates are going to celebrate with us.

lnr_sets.title: 電影之夜

lnr_sets.title: 生日驚喜

I am going to bake a big chocolate cake.

Everyone is going to hide quietly until she finally walks inside.
As soon as she opens the door, we want to jump out and yell surprise.

lnr_sets.title: 畢業舞會
sentences: The dance is next month.

lnr_sets.title: 校友聚會
sentences: The alumni meet each spring.

I could have invited more of my old classmates.
Some of them ran out of stories to tell us.
Even though many years have passed, a lot of them still remember every professor clearly.

lnr_sets.title: 話劇社排練
sentences: Our play opens next Thursday.
We are going to rehearse tonight.
A lot of lines are hard to memorize.
I want to practice my final scene once again.
I could have delivered that long speech with more feeling.
The director wants to change the whole ending one more time.
When the curtain rises on opening night, a lot of nervous actors are going to freeze.

lnr_sets.title: 辯論比賽
sentences: The debate is on Friday.
We want to prepare strong arguments.
A lot of research is still left.
I am going to lead our opening statement.
We could have rehearsed our rebuttals a bit more.
The other team wants to focus on tricky economic issues.
Because the topic is quite broad, we are going to split a lot of the work.

lnr_sets.title: 國際交流
sentences: The exchange event is tonight.
Students want to meet people abroad.
A lot of languages will be spoken.
We are going to cook dishes from home.
I could have brought photos from my hometown too.
Many of us really want to make new international friends.
As the evening goes on, a lot of shy students are going to open up more.

lnr_sets.title: 圖書館服務
sentences: The library closes at midnight.
I want to renew these books.
A lot of study rooms are booked.
I am going to return them by Friday.
You could have reserved a quiet desk online instead.
The librarian ran out of printing paper early this morning.
If you need a quiet spot to study, a lot of seats open up after lunch.

lnr_sets.title: 健身房
sentences: The gym opens at six.
I want to lift weights today.
A lot of machines are being used.
I am going to join a spin class.
You could have signed up for a personal trainer.
The staff ran out of clean towels right by noon.
Since the evening hours get so crowded, a lot of members want to come early instead.

lnr_sets.title: 餐廳打工
sentences: My shift starts at five.
I want to learn the menu.
A lot of customers come on weekends.
I am going to wait on tables tonight.
We could have handled the rush with more staff.
The kitchen ran out of fresh salmon at around eight.
Whenever a big group walks in, we are going to need a lot of extra hands.

lnr_sets.title: 宿舍生活
sentences: My roommate moved in today.
We want to decorate our room.
A lot of boxes are still unpacked.
I am going to hang some posters up.
We could have picked a slightly bigger room downstairs.
We nearly ran out of space for all our clothes.
Before the semester gets busy, we want to make our room feel a lot cozier.

lnr_sets.title: 校園書店
sentences: The bookstore has a sale.
I want to buy my textbooks.
A lot of titles are already gone.
I am going to check the used shelf.
You could have ordered that same book online cheaper.
They ran out of the biology study guide last week.
Since new editions cost so much, a lot of students want to rent their books instead.

lnr_sets.title: 學生餐廳
sentences: The dining hall serves breakfast.
I want to try the omelet.
A lot of tables are already full.
I am going to grab a salad too.
They could have added a few more vegetarian options.
The kitchen ran out of fresh pancakes before nine o'clock.
Whenever exams get close, a lot of students want to eat here late at night.

lnr_sets.title: 諮商中心
sentences: The center offers free sessions.

A lot of students feel stressed lately.
I am going to book an appointment today.
You could have called their support hotline last night.
The counselors ran out of open slots for this week.
If the pressure feels too heavy, a lot of people want to reach out for help.

lnr_sets.title: 校醫室
sentences: The clinic opens at nine.
I want to see a nurse.
A lot of students caught the flu.
I am going to get a quick checkup.
You could have booked a doctor a lot sooner.
The pharmacy ran out of that strong cough syrup today.
Because so many people are sick, a lot of appointments are going to fill up fast.

lnr_sets.title: 收發室
sentences: The mail room closes early.

I am going to check my own mailbox first.

The staff ran out of paper slips to notify busy students.
When your tracking says delivered, a lot of packages are going to sit here for days.

lnr_sets.title: 電腦教室
sentences: The lab has new computers.

Since the deadline is tonight, a lot of students are going to stay here until late.

lnr_sets.title: 職涯中心

lnr_sets.title: 註冊組
